top_signals.title: Chinese Oil Imports May Never Fully Recover From the Iran War
top_signals.summary: Chinese oil imports may never fully recover from the Iran war, with analysts saying the conflict accelerated a permanent shift away from fuels like gasoline and diesel.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iran hails ‘progress’ to end Lebanon war
top_signals.summary: Tehran and Washington locked in talks in Switzerland over deal to settle four-month conflict
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Manufacturers and Traders Trust Company

top_signals.title: Air Force One begins commissioning flights, final step before presidential use
top_signals.summary: The service announced the delivery of the Qatari-donated aircraft to Joint Base Andrews on Friday and the kickoff of its commissioning flights.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
